title: Resume
description: This is a stubbed description for the resume page.

workExperience.description: Manage and operate a tree service business, providing tree care and maintenance services to residential and commercial clients.
achievements: Founded and grew a small business startup, boosting customer base by 100% while managing operations and project success.
Implemented efficient scheduling and resource management strategies, reducing operational costs by 15% and improving service delivery.
Successfully completed over 500 tree care projects, maintaining a 95% customer satisfaction rate through quality service and effective communication.
Cultivated strong client relationships, leading to a 30% increase in repeat business through transparent communication and trust-building.
Built and mainrtained a strong online presence, increasing brand visibility and attracting new customers.
requirements: Daily operations include client consultations, project management, and team leadership.
Organize and manage a team of 3 employees, ensuring efficient workflow and high-quality service delivery.
Strong analytical skills and ability to identify market opportunities.
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
Office management and organizational skills, including scheduling, invoicing, and customer relationship management.
Physical fitness and ability to perform manual labor, including climbing and working at heights.

workExperience.description: Working on various projects related to web development and cloud services.
achievements: Contributed to the development of a scalable web application, improving performance by 30% and enhancing user experience.
Built and maintained a homelab infrastructure, optimizing resource utilization.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines, reducing deployment time by 50% and increasing deployment frequency.
Successfully developed and deployed microservices, improving system modularity and scalability.
requirements: Proficient in JavaScript, React, Node.js, and cloud technologies.
Experience with agile development methodologies and version control systems.
Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work in a collaborative team environment.

workExperience.description: Manage site operations for a music festival, including logistics, vendor coordination, and on-site management.
achievements: Successfully coordinated logistics for a multi-day music festival, ensuring smooth operations and high attendee satisfaction.
Implemented a vendor management system, improving communication and efficiency among festival vendors.
Developed and executed on-site management plans, resulting in a 20% increase in operational efficiency.
Led a team of volunteers and staff during the festival, fostering a collaborative and positive work environment.
Cultivated strong relationships with vendors and stakeholders, contributing to the overall success of the festival.
requirements: Experience in event management and logistics coordination.
Strong organizational and communication skills.
Ability to manage a team and work under pressure during events.

workExperience.description: Provided bicycle repair and maintenance services to customers, ensuring high-quality workmanship and customer satisfaction.
achievements: Successfully repaired and maintained bicycles, maintaining a high standard of workmanship and customer satisfaction.
Implemented efficient repair processes, reducing turnaround time by 20% and increasing customer throughput.
Cultivated strong customer relationships, leading to a 25% increase in repeat business through excellent service and communication.
Trained and mentored junior mechanics, improving team skills and performance.
requirements: Proficient in bicycle repair and maintenance techniques.
Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
Excellent customer service skills and ability to communicate effectively with customers.

workExperience.description: Managed front desk operations for a recreation department, providing excellent customer service and ensuring smooth operations.
achievements: Successfully managed front desk operations, ensuring efficient service delivery and high customer satisfaction.
Implemented a new scheduling system, improving efficiency and reducing wait times for customers.
Cultivated strong relationships with customers, leading to increased community engagement and participation in recreational programs.
Trained and supervised front desk staff, improving team performance and customer service quality.
requirements: Experience in customer service and front desk operations.
Strong organizational and communication skills.
Ability to manage a team and work in a fast-paced environment.

workExperience.description: Served in the United States Marine Corps, performing various roles including electrician and motor transport operator.
achievements: Successfully completed military training and served in various roles, demonstrating adaptability and commitment to service.
Received commendations for outstanding performance and dedication to duty.
Cultivated strong teamwork and leadership skills through military service.
requirements: Military training and experience in various roles.
Strong discipline, teamwork, and leadership skills.
Ability to adapt to various environments and situations.
